name: cenclave-lib-crypto
documentation:
# Cryptography Library for Cosmian Enclave

## Overview

Python cryptography library for [Cosmian Enclave](https://docs.cosmian.com/compute/cosmian_enclave/overview/) based on [PyNaCl](https://github.com/pyca/pynacl/) (binding to [libsodium](https://github.com/jedisct1/libsodium)) and [cryptography](https://github.com/pyca/cryptography).

## Installation

```console
$ pip install cenclave-lib-crypto
```

documentation: Error when nonce does not exist for a specific path.

classes.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.error.ExtensionNotFound
documentation: Error when suffix extension is not found in a specific path.

modules.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.xsalsa20_poly1305
documentation: cenclave_lib_crypto.aead module.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.xsalsa20_poly1305.random_key
documentation:
Generate a random symmetric key for XSalsa20-Poly1305.

Returns
-------
bytes
    Random symmetric key of length AEAD_KEY_LENGHT.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.xsalsa20_poly1305.encrypt
documentation:
Encrypt bytes `data` using XSalsa20-Poly1305.

Parameters
----------
data : bytes
    Data to be encrypted.
key : bytes
    Symmetric key used for encryption.
nonce : Optional[bytes]
    Arbitrary number that can be used just once. Randomly
    generated if not provided.

Returns
-------
bytes
    Ciphertext of `data` using `key`.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.xsalsa20_poly1305.encrypt_file
documentation:
Encrypt file `path` using XSalsa20-Poly1305.

Parameters
----------
path : Path
    Path to the data to be encrypted.
key : bytes
    Symmetric key used for encryption.
nonce : Optional[bytes]
    Arbitrary number that can be used just once. Randomly
    generated if not provided.
ext : str
    Extension for the encrypted file.

Returns
-------
Path
    Path to the encrypted file `path`.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.xsalsa20_poly1305.encrypt_directory
documentation:
Encrypt the content of directory `dir_path` using XSalsa20-Poly1305.

Parameters
----------
dir_path : Path
    Path to the directory to be encrypted.
pattern: str
    A pattern to be matched in the directory.
key : bytes
    Symmetric key used for encryption.
nonces : Optional[Dict[str, bytes]]
    Map of string path to nonce. Randomly generated if None.
exceptions: List[str]
    List of files which won't be encrypted.
ignore_patterns: List[str]
    List of patterns which won't be copied.
out_dir_path: Path
    Output directory path. Will be removed if already exists.

Returns
-------
Dict[str, bytes]
    Map of path string to nonce used to encrypt.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.xsalsa20_poly1305.decrypt
documentation:
Decrypt bytes `encrypted_data` using XSalsa20-Poly1305.

Parameters
----------
encrypted_data : bytes
    Encrypted data to be decrypted.
key : bytes
    Symmetric key used for encryption.
nonce : Optional[bytes]
    Arbitrary number that can be used just once. Part of the
    ciphertext when omitted.

Returns
-------
bytes
    Cleartext of `encrypted_data`.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.xsalsa20_poly1305.decrypt_file
documentation:
Decrypt file `path` using XSalsa20-Poly1305.

Parameters
----------
path : Path
    Path to the data to be decrypted.
key : bytes
    Symmetric key used for decryption.
nonce : Optional[bytes]
    Arbitrary number that can be used just once. Part of the
    ciphertext when omitted.
ext : str
    Extension of encrypted file.
out_path : Optional[Path]
    Output path if different from `path.with_suffix("")`.

Returns
-------
Path
    Path to the decrypted file `path`.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.xsalsa20_poly1305.decrypt_directory
documentation:
Decrypt the content of directory `dir_path` using XSalsa20-Poly1305.

Parameters
----------
dir_path : Path
    Path to the directory to be decrypted.
key : bytes
    Symmetric key used for decryption.
ext : str
    File extension of encrypted files.
out_dir_path : Optional[Path]
    Output directory path if different from `dir_path`.

Returns
-------
bool
    True if success, raise an exception otherwise.

modules.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.x25519
documentation: cenclave_lib_crypto.x25519 module.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.x25519.x25519_keygen
documentation:
Keygen for X25519 (DH using Curve25519 in Montgomery form).

Returns
-------
Tuple[bytes, bytes]
    Keypair (public_key, private_key).

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.x25519.x25519_pk_from_sk
documentation: X25519 public key from `private_key`.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.x25519.x25519
documentation:
Scalar multiplication over Curve25519.

Parameters
----------
private_key: bytes
    Scalar to be used as private key.
public_key: bytes
    Bytes of the point on the Curve25519.

Returns
-------
bytes
    Point on the Curve25519 to be used as shared secret.

modules.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.seal_box
documentation: cenclave_lib_crypto.seal_box module.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.seal_box.seal
documentation:
Seal with seal box of libsodium (X25519 and XSalsa20-Poly1305).

Parameters
----------
data : bytes
    The data to be sealed.
recipient_public_key : bytes
    Recipent X25519 public key (32 bytes).

Returns
-------
bytes
    `data` sealed for `recipient_public_key`.


Notes
-----
ephemeral_pk ‖ box(m,
                   recipient_pk,
                   ephemeral_sk,
                   nonce=blake2b(ephemeral_pk ‖ recipient_pk))

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.seal_box.unseal
documentation:
Unseal with seal box of libsodium (X25519 and XSalsa20-Poly1305).

Parameters
----------
encrypted_data : bytes
    The encrypted data to be unsealed:
    ephemeral_pk (32 bytes) || MAC (16 bytes) || box(data) (var).
private_key : bytes
    X25519 private key (32 bytes).

Returns
-------
bytes
    cleartext data if success.

modules.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.conversion
documentation: cenclave_lib_crypto.conversion module.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.conversion.ed25519_pk_from_sk_
documentation:
Recover public key from private key created for Ed25519.

Parameters
----------
private_key: bytes
    Bytes of the Ed25519 private key.

Returns
-------
bytes
    Bytes of the Ed25519 public key corresponding to `private_key`.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.conversion.ed25519_to_x25519_keypair_
documentation:
Map edwards25519 keypair to curve25519 keypair.

Parameters
----------
public_key: bytes
    Bytes of the Ed25519 public key.
seed : bytes
    Bytes of the Ed25519 seed.

Returns
-------
Tuple[bytes, bytes]
    Keypair (pk, sk) for X25519

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.conversion.ed25519_to_x25519_pk_
documentation:
Map edwards25519 point to curve25519 point.

Parameters
----------
public_key: bytes
    Bytes of the Ed25519 public key.

Returns
-------
bytes
    Public key for X25519.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.conversion.ed25519_to_x25519_sk
documentation:
Map Ed25519 private key to X25519 private key.

Parameters
----------
private_key : Ed25519PrivateKey
    Ed25519 private key.

Returns
-------
X25519PrivateKey
    X25519 private key corresponding to `private_key`.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.conversion.ed25519_to_x25519_pk
documentation:
Map Ed25519 public key to X25519 public key.

Parameters
----------
public_key: Ed25519PublicKey
    Ed25519 public key.

Returns
-------
bytes
    Bytes of the X25519 public key corresponding to `public_key`.

modules.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.ed25519
documentation: cenclave_lib_crypto.ed25519 module.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.ed25519.ed25519_keygen
documentation:
Keygen for Ed25519 (EdDSA using edwards25519).

Returns
-------
Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]
    Triple (public_key, seed, private_key).

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.ed25519.ed25519_seed_keygen
documentation:
Seeded keygen for Ed25519 (EdDSA using edwards25519).

Returns
-------
Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]
    Triple (public_key, seed, private_key).

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.ed25519.sign
documentation:
Sign `data` with `private_key` using Ed25519.

Parameters
----------
data : bytes
    Data to be signed.
private_key : bytes
    Private key used to sign data.

Returns
-------
bytes
    64 bytes Ed25519 signature.

functions.name: cenclave_lib_crypto.ed25519.verify
documentation:
Verify `sig` with `data` and `public_key` using Ed25519.

Parameters
----------
data : bytes
    Data which has been signed.
sig : bytes
    64 bytes signature.
public_key : bytes
    Public key used to verify the signature.

Returns
-------
bytes
    Original bytes of the message if the verification succeeded.
